front: What are the common excipients used in peptide formulations?
back: Excipients: 1) Bulking agents (mannitol, sucrose, trehalose), 2) Stabilizers (polysorbate 80, BSA), 3) Buffering agents (histidine, acetate, phosphate), 4) Tonicity modifiers (NaCl, glycine), 5) Antimicrobial preservatives (phenol, m-cresol), 6) Cryoprotectants (trehalose, sucrose).
